channel.title: Simple Patch Finder - ArcGIS Enterprise RSS
channel.description: Latest ArcGIS Enterprise server-side component patches from Simple Patch Finder.

item.title: ArcGIS Server 11.5 Utility Network Patch 2 (S-115-P-1381)
